/CAL: PTD RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PTD IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE RESTITUTION, THE COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ    3D/CTS:3   /WS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/BKFEE/COLLECT/RESTPTD/CONTD:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE RESTITUTION/DOPU:PTD/DEF:WAIVES ANY CLAIM TO ANY PORTION OR ANY RIGHT TO $41,000 THAT WAS SEIZED/X:TWO BLACKBERRY PHONES AND ONE SAMSUNG PHONE WILL BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANTS, NOIPHONES WILL BE RETURNED, ONLY LEGITIMATE IDENTIFICATION CARDS BELONGING TODEFENDANTS WILL BE RETURNED/WEAP/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/BE/X:HARVEY WAIVER ENTERED AS TO DISMISSED COUNTS/

/CAL:TO SET/MISDRED1:1/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/REMA//DEF:MAY PROVIDE FURTHER DOCUMENTATION OF LAWFULLY OWNED IPHONES OR OTHER PROPERTY THEY MAY ADD THE CASE TO CALENDAR AT A LATER DATE/

/CAL:TO SET & APPOINTMENT OF CONFLICT COUNSEL/CON:JULIANA DROUS/STWPX/CONTD:TO SET IN DEPT 9/DOP/CTORD:DRIVER'S LICENSE TO BE RELEASED TO DEFENDANT WITH STIPULATION BY PARTIES THAT A COPY OF IT MAY BE USED AS EVIDENCE IFNECESSARY/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 06-13-14/987,2/BAIL:40000     /TE:3 HOURS/CONTD: TO SET& COUNSEL/
